description: Product description Febreze Air Freshener with Odourclear technology fights odours, leaving a light fresh scent. Immerse yourself in the captivating embrace of Febreze Mrs. Hinch's Cosy Season. Zesty bergamot and oriental spices create an invigorating burst of freshness, while white flowers lend a touch of elegance. The alluring base of warm amber, hypnotic patchouli, vetiver, and precious Oudh completes this enchanting symphony, enveloping your space in a cozy and sophisticated ambiance. Febreze Aerosols are non-flammable and a perfect fit for any room in the house. Try the full range of Febreze products with the unique Odourclear technology, such as Febreze Fabric Refresher and Car Freshener. Try also Febreze 3volution Plugs, to continuously fight odours and freshen for up to 90 days. Unique Febreze Odourclear technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent. Leaves your home with a beautiful light, fresh scent. Febreze Spray Air Fresheners available in a wide range of fragrances. Febreze Spray Air Freshener, non-flammable and perfect for any room in the house. Zesty bergamot and oriental spices with notes of white flowers and warm amber. Febreze. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP, UK
